attempted_route: ECFP4 (radius=2, 2048-bit) drug features + XGBRegressor(n_estimators=500, lr=0.05); PyBioMed CTD recommended by r1 but unavailable; fell back to manual pseudo-CTD (AAC+DPC+7-group comp/trans/dist, 470-dim)
observation: exec exit_code=0, file produced; eval: data_correctness=True, func_correctness=False. PyBioMed import failed silently; pseudo-CTD fallback still yields wrong drug ranking.
rationale: PyBioMed was not installed in the execution environment; the r1-recommended CalculateCTD call was never reached. The manual pseudo-CTD fallback (composition+transition+distribution over 7 groups) is still composition-dominated and cannot recover binding-site positional signal sufficient for correct ranking.
recommended_alternative: Use DeepPurpose (DTI.train() with drug_encoding='MPNN', target_encoding='CNN') or, if unavailable, use ESM-2 protein embeddings (esm.pretrained.esm2_t6_8M_UR50D via fair-esm) as target features concatenated with ECFP4 drug features, replacing all hand-crafted sequence descriptors; these capture structural context the DAVIS kinase data requires for correct repurposing ranking.
